dashboard.title: 💑 Dashboard
dashboard.domestique: 🏠 Monthly hours spent on household tasks

bot.welcome:
💰 Welcome to Expense Tracker! Let's add your monthly expenses.

Format: You'll be asked for:
1. Expense label (e.g., 'Housing', 'Food', 'Transport')
2. Monthly amount (in dollars)
3. Who paid (woman, man, or shared)

You can add as many expenses as you want. Type 'done' when finished.

Let's start!
bot.expenseRecorded: Great! I've recorded the expense: {label} - ${amount} (paid by {paidBy}). Would you like to add another expense? Type "yes" to continue or "done" to finish.
bot.expenseFinished: ✅ Great! I've finished recording your expenses. You can view them in the Expenses table on the dashboard. Feel free to add more later!
bot.allQuestionsAnswered: All questions for {person} have been answered. Click '{otherPerson}'s Questions' to continue.
bot.allDone: All questions for {person} have been answered. Thank you!
bot.error: Sorry, I couldn't start the expense tracker. Please try again.

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this?
messages.updateFailed: Failed to update. Please try again.
messages.deleteFailed: Failed to delete. Please try again.

equality.title: ⚖️ Couple Equality Index
equality.noData: Insufficient data — please fill in salaries, expenses, and household hours.
equality.score90: ✅ Very good equality in the couple!
equality.score50: 🟠 Notable inequality. A conversation is needed.
equality.score0: 🔴 Strong inequality detected. Review the distribution.
